description: This file contains Balanda past continuous negative modality constructions. This modality expresses past inability or impossibility of an ongoing action and corresponds to the English meaning 'could not be ...-ing'.

rules.core_meaning: Past inability or impossibility during an ongoing action

affirmative_form.note: This construction is inherently negative in meaning

question_form.structure: Subject + kamamve + dho + ti-VERB + (Object/Complement) + gba + we?
question_form.function: Forms yes/no questions expressing past inability

constraints: dho must immediately precede the ti-verb
ti- must not be removed or replaced
gba must appear at the end of the clause before the question particle
No word order change occurs in questions
This construction must not be used for simple past or present meanings
The construction expresses modality, not factual negation alone

balanda: Ne kamamve dho tija nza gba
Ne kamamve dho tinzü ngo gba
Ni kamamve dho titeli gba
Ne kamamve dho tiyai a Wau gba
english: I couldn’t be going to Wau.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho tidhii agbi tiyi gba
english: He couldn’t be coming to the house.

balanda: Wiki kamamve dho tinono gbi difo gba
english: The child couldn’t be walking in the compound.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho timande gbi njü gba
english: He couldn’t be working in the garden.

balanda: Danda kamamve dho timoliki gba
Ne kamamve dho timerego ŋo gba
Ne kamamve dho tiŋiyi sereso gba
english: I couldn’t be knowing the truth.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho titerii gba
Ne kamamve dho tiwe ndi gba
Ni kamamve dho tivel e takoni gba
english: He couldn’t be telling a story.

balanda: Ne kamamve dho tibaha ŋo gba
Ni kamamve dho tidhi gba
Ne kamamve dho tisudi kitab gba
english: I couldn’t be writing a book.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho tidheke kitab gba
english: He couldn’t be reading a book.

balanda: Ne kamamve dho tisïhï kese gba
english: I couldn’t be buying a bike.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho tisadi nza gba
Ne kamamve dho tituru linguu gba
english: I couldn’t be pushing the fruit.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho tizaka kporo gba
english: He couldn’t be pulling the drum.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho tikara kafa gba
english: He couldn’t be turning the table.

balanda: Ne kamamve dho tikeye ti ndi gba
Danda kamamve dho tiwofo takoni gba
english: We couldn’t be discussing the story.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho tikolo wiki gba
english: He couldn’t be hugging the child.

balanda: Ndi kamamve dho timago gba
Ni kamamve dho tivanda wiki gba
english: He couldn’t be protecting the child.

balanda: Ni kamamve dho titeta gba
Ni kamamve dho tigirri gba
Nguu kamamve dho tivere gba
Maraya kamamve dho tideye gba
Wiki kamamve dho tirengo gba
Ni kamamve dho tidho gbi tiyi gba
english: He couldn’t be being in the house.

balanda: Ne kamamve dho tima nde gba
english: I couldn’t be doing the work.

balanda: Ne kamamve dho tiwala gbi Wau gba
english: I couldn’t be living in Wau.

balanda: Ne kamamve dho tiduru ngo gba
Ni kamamve dho tidüŋü kpendii gba
Ni kamamve dho tibase gba
Ni kamamve dho tidulu gba
Ne kamamve dho tiloro kananje gba
english: I couldn’t be watching the animals.

balanda: Ne kamamve dho tija nza gba we?
Ne kamamve dho tinzü ngo gba we?
Ni kamamve dho titeli gba we?
Ne kamamve dho tiyai a Wau gba we?
english: Couldn’t I be going to Wau?

balanda: Ni kamamve dho tidhii agbi tiyi gba we?
english: Couldn’t he be coming to the house?
